approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities and firm commitments as eligible hedged items, which places foreign exchange risk on a recognised receivable within the fair value hedge model.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies forecast transactions as hedged items, including certain highly probable intragroup foreign-currency transactions in consolidated financial statements, which makes the cash flow hedge model a peer IFRS hedge-accounting approach.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 separately recognise hedging of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct hedge-accounting model for foreign exchange risk in consolidated financial statements.
